metadata.title: PayPak Debit Card | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan PayPak Debit Card is a PIN based card that ensures utmost security not only at ATM machine for cash withdrawal but also at POS terminal while shopping at all merchant outlets across Pakistan.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print PayPak Debit Card Be Pakistani, Pay Pakistani! Meezan PayPak Debit Card is a PIN based card that ensures utmost security not only at ATM machine for cash withdrawal but also at POS terminal while shopping at all merchant outlets across Pakistan. Features and Benefits Cash Withdrawal POS Transactions Balance Inquiry Bill Payments Inter Bank Funds Transfer Funds Transfer (Within Meezan) Fees, Charges & Transaction Limits Annual Charges PayPak Debit Card Rs. 1600 per annum plus tax Card Replacement Charges (Lost, Stolen, Damaged) PayPak Debit Card Same as Annual Charges ATM Charges Cash Withdrawal (on 1Link ATMs other than MBL) Rs. 23.44 per Transaction Cash Withdrawal (on other switches) 23.44 per Transaction Balance Inquiry (on 1Link / MNET ATMs) Rs. 5 per Inquiry POS Charges Local Purchase Free Document Retrieval Charges Local Rs. 200 per Document PayPak Debit Card – Transaction Limits Transaction Type Channel Single Transaction Limit Per Day Limit Cash Withdrawal ALL Rs. 50,000 Rs. 50,000 POS/NFC Purchase 50,000 Rs. 50,000 Bank Funds Transfer ATM Rs. 100,000 Rs. 100,000 Bank Funds Transfer IB & MB Rs. 250,000 Rs. 250,000 Third Party Funds Transfer (within Meezan) 100,000 Rs. 100,000 Transfer (within Meezan) 250,000 Rs. 250,000 Own Account Funds Transfer ALL Rs. 250,000 Rs. 500,000 ATM Networks Meezan Bank offers a nation-wide network of ATMs located at its branches and prominent offsite locations. There is no need to carry cash anymore; simply go to the ATM and withdraw cash 24 hours a day. We also offer access to more than 8,000 ATMs country-wide via 1Link and MNET Networks. FAQs What is PayPak? PayPak is a domestic payment scheme owned and operated by 1Link Guarantee Ltd duly approved by State Bank of Pakistan. What is Meezan PayPak Debit Card? The debit cards issued by Meezan Bank under PayPak are named as Meezan PayPak Debit Card. PayPak Debit Card enables you to carry out ATM transactions as well as retail... Where can I use my Meezan PayPak Debit card? Your Meezan PayPak debit card can be used to carry out transactions on all ATMs displaying 1Link and MNET signs and with PayPak merchants anywhere within Pakistan. Is PayPak Debit Card secure? All transactions made through Meezan PayPak Debit card are secured via a 4 digit PIN code. How do I activate PayPak Debit Card? You can easily activate your Debit Card using Meezan Bank's ATM card activation facility. Please follow the following simple steps: - Visit any Meezan Bank ATM - Insert the card in ATM machine - A 6-digit OTP send on customer’s registered mobile number - Enter that OTP on ATM - Then enter the 4-digit PIN code to set the ATM PIN - Re-renter the PIN - The card comes out and is activated Alternatively, you may call our 24/7 Call Centre at (+92 21) 111-331-331 or 111-331-332. The Phone Banking Officer will activate your card upon successful verification. What should I do if Debit Card is lost or stolen? As soon as you realize that your card is lost or stolen, please report it immediately by calling our 24/7Call 21) 111-331-331 or 111-331-332 or you can use our Meezan Banking app to deactivate your card. A new card will be replaced upon your request. Downloads Schedule of Charges Guidelines for ATM users Terms and Conditions Visa Dispute Form MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
